moments.title: Spain lifts World Cup 2026 trophy
moments.blurb: Spain defeated Argentina 1-0 in the final of the FIFA World Cup 2026, which concluded on Sunday, July 19th.

angles.name: Winner Buzz
angles.copy: Still buzzing from the World Cup final? Spain made history, taking the trophy home this weekend after beating Argentina!

angles.name: Post-Match Discussion
angles.copy: The dust has settled on the FIFA World Cup 2026! Spain are champions. What was your favourite moment from the tournament?

moments.title: Latitude Festival kicks off
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival 2026 runs from Thursday, July 23rd to Sunday, July 26th in Henham Park, Suffolk, featuring headliners David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Festival Excitement
angles.copy: Suffolk is buzzing! Latitude Festival opens its gates tomorrow with a massive lineup across music, comedy, and arts. Who are you most excited to see?

angles.name: Headliner Focus
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is ON! David Byrne, Teddy Swims, Lewis Capaldi all headlining this weekend at Henham Park. Get ready for some incredible live music!

moments.title: WOMAD Festival brings world music to Wiltshire
moments.blurb: The World of Music, Arts and Dance (WOMAD) Festival is taking place from Thursday, July 23rd to Sunday, July 26th at its new home in Neston Park, Wiltshire.

angles.name: Global Music
angles.copy: Ready for a world of music? WOMAD Festival kicks off tomorrow in Wiltshire, bringing incredible artists and cultures together for four days!

angles.name: Festival Discovery
angles.copy: Beyond the mainstream! WOMAD Festival is back from Thursday to Sunday at Neston Park. Discover new sounds and global legends all weekend.

moments.title: J.Lo turns 56
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 56th birthday on Friday, July 24th.

angles.name: J.Lo Celebration
angles.copy: Jenny from the block is 56! Wishing a very happy birthday to the multi-talented Jennifer Lopez this Friday. What's your go-to J.Lo anthem?

angles.name: Happy Birthday J.Lo
angles.copy: Still on the dancefloor! Celebrate J.Lo's 56th birthday with us on Friday. From music to movies, she does it all!

moments.title: Slash celebrates 61st birthday
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses guitarist Slash (Saul Hudson) turns 61 on Thursday, July 23rd.

angles.name: Rock Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Welcome to the Jungle! Happy 61st birthday to the legendary Guns N' Roses guitarist, Slash, this Thursday. Those riffs are timeless!

angles.name: Guitar Icon
angles.copy: That top hat and those iconic riffs! Wishing a rockin' 61st birthday to the one and only Slash. What's your favourite GNR solo?

moments.title: Selena Gomez celebrates 34th birthday
moments.blurb: Actress and singer Selena Gomez celebrates her 34th birthday today, July 22nd.

angles.name: Pop Star Birthday
angles.copy: Happy Birthday to the amazing Selena Gomez, who turns 34 today! What's your favourite Selena track?

angles.name: From Disney to Global Star
angles.copy: From Disney to global pop sensation! Wishing Selena Gomez a very happy 34th birthday today. What a career!

moments.title: Don Henley turns 79
moments.blurb: Eagles co-founder, drummer, and vocalist Don Henley celebrates his 79th birthday today, July 22nd.

angles.name: Eagles Legend
angles.copy: Take it Easy! Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to Eagles legend Don Henley today. What's your favourite Henley-penned hit?

angles.name: Voice of Classics
angles.copy: The distinctive voice behind so many classics! Happy 79th birthday to the iconic Don Henley of The Eagles.

moments.title: Funk icon George Clinton turns 85
moments.blurb: Parliament-Funkadelic leader and funk pioneer George Clinton celebrates his 85th birthday today, July 22nd.

angles.name: Funk Master
angles.copy: Get up for the downstroke! Happy 85th birthday to the legendary funk mastermind George Clinton today. What a career!

angles.name: P-Funk Icon
angles.copy: A true pioneer of funk! Wishing a very happy 85th birthday to the one and only George Clinton. Ready to get funked up?

moments.title: Premier League pre-season in full swing
moments.blurb: Premier League clubs are continuing their pre-season preparations with a host of friendlies this week, ahead of the new season starting August 21st.

angles.name: Football Countdown
angles.copy: The countdown to the Premier League season is on! Pre-season games are happening all week – who are you excited to see in action?

angles.name: New Season Hype
angles.copy: Football's almost back! Premier League teams are warming up with friendlies this week. Any early predictions for the new season?

moments.title: Together Again Festival in Cheshire
moments.blurb: The Together Again Festival takes place from Friday, July 24th to Sunday, July 26th at Bolesworth Castle in Cheshire, featuring a mix of music, arts, and culture.

angles.name: Cheshire Festival
angles.copy: Cheshire is calling! Together Again Festival starts Friday at Bolesworth Castle for a weekend of music and good vibes. Who's going?

angles.name: Weekend Plans
angles.copy: Looking for festival fun this weekend? Together Again Festival brings a diverse lineup to Cheshire, running Friday to Sunday.

moments.title: Truck Festival in Oxfordshire
moments.blurb: Truck Festival, known for its indie-fueled spirit, runs from Thursday, July 23rd to Sunday, July 26th at Hill Farm, Steventon, Oxfordshire.

angles.name: Indie Festival
angles.copy: Ready to get your indie fix? Truck Festival kicks off tomorrow in Oxfordshire for a weekend of great music! Who's on your must-see list?

angles.name: Oxfordshire Fun
angles.copy: Another big festival weekend ahead! Truck Festival brings its unique vibe to Hill Farm from Thursday. Sun's out, tunes are on!

moments.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
moments.blurb: The legendary Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday on Sunday, July 26th.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Still got the moves like Jagger! The iconic Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday this Sunday. What's your favourite Stones track?

angles.name: Birthday Legend
angles.copy: Happy 83rd to rock and roll royalty, Mick Jagger! From the 60s to today, he's still a legend. What an incredible career!

moments.title: Queen's Roger Taylor turns 77
moments.blurb: Queen drummer Roger Taylor celebrates his 77th birthday on Sunday, July 26th.

angles.name: Queen Drummer
angles.copy: Another rock legend celebrating this Sunday! Happy 77th birthday to Queen's incredible drummer, Roger Taylor.

angles.name: Birthday Beats
angles.copy: Keeping the beat for Queen for decades! Wishing a very happy 77th birthday to the one and only Roger Taylor. What's your favourite Queen hit?

moments.title: Verdine White turns 75
moments.blurb: Earth, Wind & Fire bassist Verdine White celebrates his 75th birthday on Saturday, July 25th.

angles.name: Funk & Soul Icon
angles.copy: Boogie Wonderland! Wishing a very happy 75th birthday to the incredible Verdine White of Earth, Wind & Fire this Saturday. Still grooving!

angles.name: Birthday Groove
angles.copy: Still shining bright! Celebrate Verdine White's 75th birthday this weekend – a true funk and soul legend. What's your favourite EWF track?

moments.title: Papa Roach's Jacoby Shaddix turns 50
moments.blurb: Papa Roach frontman Jacoby Shaddix celebrates his 50th birthday on Tuesday, July 28th.

angles.name: Rocking 50
angles.copy: Cut my life into pieces, it's my birthday! Happy 50th to Papa Roach's Jacoby Shaddix this Tuesday. Still bringing the energy!

angles.name: Nu-Metal Birthday
angles.copy: Still rocking after all these years! Wishing a very happy 50th birthday to the energetic frontman Jacoby Shaddix. What's your favourite Papa Roach track?

moments.title: Boyz II Men's Wanya Morris turns 53
moments.blurb: Wanya Morris, a member of the iconic R&B group Boyz II Men, celebrates his 53rd birthday on Wednesday, July 29th.

angles.name: R&B Icon
angles.copy: End of the Road for another year! Happy 53rd birthday to Boyz II Men's Wanya Morris this Wednesday. Still got those incredible harmonies!

angles.name: Boyz II Men Birthday
angles.copy: Still harmonising! Wishing a very happy 53rd birthday to R&B legend Wanya Morris. What's your favourite Boyz II Men ballad?
